ddls:
CREATE TABLE "analytics_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "c1_smallint" TEXT /* Small integer value for metrics */,
  "c2_int" INTEGER /* Integer value for various metrics */,
  "c3_bigint" TEXT /* Big integer value for high precision metrics */,
  "c4_float" REAL /* Float value for certain calculated metrics */,
  "c5_double" TEXT /* Double value for high precision decimal metrics */,
  "c6_string" TEXT /* String data for descriptive purposes */,
  "c7_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data was recorded */,
  "c8_date" TEXT /* Date associated with the data entry */,
  "c9_bool" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating a specific condition */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the departments table */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data_sources table */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parent department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report to which this data belongs */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry associated with the report */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data entry associated with the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reporting ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for historical record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being tracked */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the data entry */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the data entry */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES analytics_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for quality metrics */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being evaluated */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score reflecting data integrity */,
  "quality_issues" TEXT /* Description of any quality issues found */,
  "checked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was last checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES analytics_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., database, API) */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for data sources that provide data via API */,
  "connection_string" TEXT /* Connection string for data sources that require it */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_settings" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration setting */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for integration */,
  "settings" TEXT /* JSON formatted settings for integration */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the settings were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduled_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled job */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for which the job runs */,
  "schedule_time" TEXT /* Schedule time for the job execution */,
  "last_run" TEXT /* Last time this job was executed */,
  "next_run" TEXT /* Next time this job is scheduled to run */,
  "job_status" TEXT /* Status of the job (e.g., running, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduled_jobs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object affected (e.g., data, user, role) */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object affected */,
  "changes" TEXT /* JSON formatted description of the changes made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* JSON formatted configuration of the dashboard layout */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dashboard was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard to which the widget belongs */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* JSON formatted configuration of the widget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the widget was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the upload */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., pending, complete, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
